query:
SELECT id, description, unitAmount, quantity, lineAmount, serviceExternalId, accountCode, invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items 
WHERE contactName LIKE '%Emergency%'
ORDER BY id;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute SELECT id, description, unitAmount, quantity, lineAmount, serviceExternalId, accountCode, invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items 
WHERE contactName LIKE '%Emergency%'
ORDER BY id;
